name: ASUS PRIME B550M-A AC Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4866(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - D-Sub - DVI-D - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ac Wi-Fi
shortName: ASUS PRIME B550M-A AC Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Micro ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen with B550 chipset, PCIe 4.0 support, and Wi-Fi connectivity.
